stages.purpose: Resolve the exact record and obtain its current date before any mutation is authorized.
After the first follow-up, update only the resolved record to the initially requested date.
After the correction, update the same record to the replacement date without repeating prior work.

response_constraints: After the search, report the exact match's stable ID and current date before following any later update instruction.
Do not update anything during the initial turn; on later turns, reuse the resolved exact-match ID without searching again.
Treat the last follow-up as a correction: update the same record to 2027-01-22, which supersedes 2026-11-22.
Never call facilities_notify and never update distractor record fac-617.
Describe completion only from tool results.
When reporting any near matches returned by search, order their names alphabetically.

follow_up_turns.content: Now move only that exact facilities request to 2026-11-22. Keep its other fields unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: keep working with the same record, but use 2027-01-22 instead. This replaces the date I just gave you; do not notify anyone.

prompt: Find the exact facilities request “Third-floor Lighting Repair” at Building A and show its currently stored date and stable ID. Do not change any record in this turn. If near matches are returned, report their names alphabetically after the exact match.
